name: file-upload
description: Native file selection plus drag-and-drop, local accept/size validation, removable file list, and event-only app upload handoff

dropzone.description: Native label activation target and pointer drop surface; contains or references the real file input

input.description: Real type=file control for keyboard, screen-reader, picker, form, and change-event access; never replace with a scripted div

prompt.description: Visible label text describing picker and drag-and-drop activation

description.description: Visible accept and size guidance referenced by the input through aria-describedby

list.description: Retained accepted files; the controller renders one file row per File object

empty.description: Empty-list message rendered while no files are retained

file.description: Generated row associated with one retained File object

details.description: Generated wrapper for file name and metadata

name.description: Generated file name, inserted with textContent

metadata.description: Generated MIME type and formatted file size

remove.description: Generated native button with a per-file accessible name; removes its File from the retained list

status.description: Polite live region announcing rejection and removal results

accept.description: Comma-separated native accept filter: extensions, exact MIME types, and type/* wildcards are validated again after selection or drop

maxSize.description: Maximum bytes per file; absent or invalid means no controller-level size limit

multiple.description: Native picker hint; the canonical multi-file recipe retains every accepted file from each batch

keyboard.Tab: focus the real file input in normal document order
keyboard.Enter: open the platform file picker from the focused file input
keyboard.Space: open the platform file picker from the focused file input
keyboard.Tab on remove: focus a generated native remove button
keyboard.Enter or Space on remove: remove that file from the retained list

notes: The visually hidden input remains the real, focusable type=file control; the dropzone is its native label, not a scripted button replacement.
The input accept attribute constrains the picker and is also validated by the controller because drag-and-drop bypasses picker filtering.
Rejections and removals are announced through the polite status live region.

faqir:files.description: Fires once after every drop or input change. files contains only accepted files from that batch; allFiles contains every currently retained file. Application code performs any upload.

faqir:file-reject.detail: { file: File, reason: 'accept'|'max-size', accept: string, maxSize: number|null, source: 'drop'|'input' }
faqir:file-reject.description: Fires once per rejected file. accept means no accept token matched; max-size means file.size exceeded data-max-size.

faqir:file-remove.detail: { file: File, index: number, files: FileList }
faqir:file-remove.description: Fires after a remove button or remove() deletes one retained file; files is the remaining FileList.

api.getFiles: () => FileList — snapshot of all retained accepted files
api.open: () => void — activate the real file input unless disabled
api.remove: (fileOrIndex) => boolean — remove one retained file and emit faqir:file-remove
api.clear: () => boolean — remove every retained file through the same removal path unless disabled
api.destroy: () => void — remove drag, input, and delegated remove listeners plus the private handle

templates.html: • No files selected
